title: PlayCanvas | Open Source WebGL & WebGPU Game Engine
data: Last month we shipped Downloadable Splats, Licenses and Social Links — giving creators more control over how their work is shared and... How I turned a photogrammetric 3D Gaussian Splat scene into a playable browser FPS - with collision, pre-baked lighting, navmesh-driven NPCs... Last month we shipped Walk Mode, Streamed LOD and Easy Upload — three huge upgrades for exploring and publishing splats. Today we're rolling...
